title: Accessible textarea component with validation and error handling
purpose: Provides a customizable textarea input with built-in validation, error display, and accessibility features including ARIA labels and proper focus management.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named TextArea that accepts various props for configuration and implements controlled component behavior with internal state management.

steps.content: Generate unique IDs for the textarea and associated accessibility elements.
Initialize internal state for the textarea value and error message.
Synchronize internal state with the provided value prop when it changes.
Define and return the textarea element with all configured props and event handlers.
Render the label, textarea, error message, and character counter elements when needed.
Extract the new value from the change event.
Update the internal state with the new value.
Notify the parent component of the value change via the onChange prop.
Validate the new value if a validation function is provided.
Update the error state based on validation results.
Validate the current internal value if a validation function is provided.
Update the error state based on validation results.
